mode.name: P6.0-P6.2 runtime benchmark upgrade
mode.non_counted_reason: Contract/scaffold materialization only; no formal strategy benchmark.

strategies.description: One agent alternates think, act, and observe until completion or block.
One agent creates a short plan, executes a step, verifies it, and retries or replans as needed.
A ReAct actor completes the task and a separate verifier checks the final artifact and trace.
A Supervisor plans and delegates typed HandoffPacket work to specialist mobile coding roles.
A router selects the best specialist swarm by task category, device/runtime profile, and load.
A manager decomposes the task and delegates to workers, then reconciles judged outputs.

tasks.title: P6.0 benchmark task taxonomy, runtime assertion matrix, and score dimensions
P6.1 mailbox, evidence ledger, runtime event bus, and memory proposal contracts
P6.2 runtime verifier JSON and non-counted run contract scaffold
